meaning: n.卫兵,近卫兵,州辖预备役部队成员
examples: This was the epoch when a National Guardsman fought like a Zouave.
The doll is like a guardsman who keeps an eye on farms and houses to protect thieves.
Guardsman lee Williams 18 is one of the desert rats 'royal Scots dragoon guards battle group.
Capt Steve Munro read a statement in tribute to Guardsman Shadrake outside the church at Thursday's service.
